ADVANCED_ENABLE_TDP_CONTROLS_DESC: Enable TDP slider and other advanced options
ADVANCED_ENABLE_MANUAL_CPU_CONTROLS_DESC: Enable manual CPU boost, SMT, power governor, and EPP controls
ADVANCED_ENABLE_SIMPLE_EPP_LABELS_DESC: Enable more intuitive labels for EPP and power governor
ADVANCED_ENABLE_AUTO_CPU_MANAGEMENT_DESC: Enable automatic management of CPU boost, EPP, SMT, and governor
ADVANCED_ENABLE_AC_POWER_PROFILES: Enable Per-Game AC Power TDP Profiles
ADVANCED_ENABLE_AC_POWER_PROFILES_DESC: Use separate per-game TDP profiles when connected to AC power. Per-game profiles must be enabled
ADVANCED_ENABLE_BACKGROUND_POLLING_DESC: Polling sets TDP every few seconds
ADVANCED_FORCE_DISABLE_TDP_ON_RESUME: Force Disable TDP Settings on Resume
ADVANCED_FORCE_DISABLE_TDP_ON_RESUME_DES: Disable automatic TDP settings when resuming from sleep
ADVANCED_FORCE_DISABLE_SUSPEND_ACTIONS_D: Disable all suspend-related changes when putting device into sleep mode
ADVANCED_MAX_TDP_ON_RESUME_DESC: Temporarily set TDP to maximum for X seconds when resuming from sleep
ADVANCED_RYZENADJ_UNDERVOLT_DESC: Warning, use with caution. ryzenadj --set-coall flag value
ADVANCED_TEMP_MAX_TDP_PROFILE_DESC: Temporarily set TDP to maximum for X seconds when starting a game
ADVANCED_FORCE_OVERRIDE_MAX_TDP_DESC: Warning, use only if you know what you're doing. Sets maximum TDP limit to 120W
ADVANCED_DECK_ENABLE_TDP_ADJUSTMENT_DESC: Warning, requires custom BIOS for Steam Deck
ADVANCED_DECK_ENABLE_CUSTOM_GPU_CLOCK_DE: Warning, requires custom BIOS for Steam Deck
ADVANCED_ASUS_EXTREME_POWERSAVE_DESC: Reduces power consumption during sleep mode. Warning, requires updated MCU firmware and updated Asus-Linux kernel module
ADVANCED_ASUS_USE_WMI_DESC: Use Asus WMI calls instead of ryzenadj
